title: C@ba' #5434
definition:
Seba = "drink thou"

 n pr m
 1) a son of Cush

 n pr loc
 2) a nation south of Palestine, perhaps Ethiopia
nasbUsage:
Definition: Seba = "drink thou"

 n pr m
 1) a son of Cush

 n pr loc
 2) a nation south of Palestine, perhaps Ethiopia

    NASB:  son of Cush, also his desc. and their land
